memoryArtifacts.description:
It is named for its original creator, Sir Ralph Lumley, who converted his family manor house into a castle in 1389 after returning from wars in Scotland. However, after being implicated in a plot to overthrow Henry IV he was imprisoned and ultimately executed, forfeiting his lands to the Earl of Somerset. In 1421 the ownership of the Castle reverted to Sir Ralph Lumley's grandson, Thomas.

By the nineteenth century, the castle had become the residence of the Bishop of Durham, after Bishop Van Mildert gave his residence of Durham Castle to the newly founded University of Durham. The castle thus became a hall of residence for University College, Durham. Castlemen, as the students of University College, Durham are known, spent their first year at Lumley Castle and subsequent years in the Castle at Durham. Lumley Castle was sold in the 1960s by University College to fund the building of the 'Moatside' residential halls in central Durham, in order to keep all students on the same site.[2] The role of Lumley Castle in University College's history is still commemorated by students in the biannual 'Lumley Run'.

The castle was the historic seat of the Earls of Scarbrough.

zh.lifeSummary: 當Ralph Lumley 1st Baron Lumley於大約1361年出生在英國達勒姆時，他的父親Marmaduke Lumley48歲，母親Margaret De Holland41歲。他於1378年與Eleanor Neville在英國結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1400年1月在英國格盧斯特斯爾希雷斯特享年40歲，埋葬在英國達勒姆。

nameMeanings.name: Lumley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (northern): habitational name from Lumley, a place in County Durham, so named from Old English lum(m) ‘pool’ (see Lum 1) + lēah ‘woodland clearing’.

variants.name: Lum
meanings: English: habitational name from Lumb in Lancashire. In some instances the name may be topographic for someone who lived by a pool, Middle English lum(m).
Chinese: variant Romanization of the surnames 林 (see   Lin   1) and 藍 (see   Lan   1), based on their Cantonese pronunciations.

variants.name: Lemley
meanings: Perhaps an altered form of English   Lumley  .

nameMeanings.name: Ralph
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

variants.name: Ralf
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Ralph Lumley 1st Baron Lumley was born about 1361, in Durham, England, his father, Marmaduke Lumley, was 48 and his mother, Margaret De Holland, was 41. He married Eleanor Neville in 1378, in England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 2 daughters. He died in January 1400, in Cirencester, Gloucestershire, England, at the age of 40, and was buried in Durham, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ralph Lumley 1st Baron Lumley est né environ 1361, à Durham, Angleterre, son père, Marmaduke Lumley, avait 48 ans et sa mère, Margaret De Holland, avait 41 ans. Il a épousé Eleanor Neville en 1378, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en janvier 1400, à Cirencester, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 40 ans, et a été enterré à Durham, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ralph Lumley 1st Baron Lumley um 1361 in Durham, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Marmaduke Lumley 48 und seine Mutter Margaret De Holland 41. Er hat 1378 in England Eleanor Neville geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb im Januar 1400 im Alter von 40 Jahren in Cirencester, Gloucestershire, England und wurde in Durham, England begraben.

ko.lifeSummary: Ralph Lumley 1st Baron Lumley(이)가 대략 1361년 영국 뒤람에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Marmaduke Lumley(은)는 48세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret De Holland(은)는 41세였다. 그는 1378년 영국에서 Eleanor Neville(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1400년 1월 영국 그루스스터실르 시렌스스터에서 40세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 뒤람에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ralph Lumley 1st Baron Lumley nasceu aproximadamente 1361, em Durham, Inglaterra, seu pai, Marmaduke Lumley, tinha 48 anos e sua mãe, Margaret De Holland, tinha 41 anos. Ele casou-se com Eleanor Neville em 1378, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em janeiro de 1400, em Cirencester, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, com 40 anos, e foi sepultado em Durham, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ralph Lumley 1st Baron Lumley родился около 1361 г. в местности дурам, Англия, его отцу по имени Marmaduke Lumley было 48 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret De Holland, 41. Он женился на женщине по имени Eleanor Neville в 1378 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он умер январь 1400 г. в местности сиренсестир, глоусестиршир, Англия в возрасте 40 лет и был похоронен в местности дурам, Англия.
